basicDetails.schemeName: Smt. Uma Gupta Fellowship for M.Sc. Agriculture (Genetics & Plant Breeding) Students
basicDetails.implementingAgency: Govind Ballabh Pant University Of Agriculture And Technology, Pantnagar

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Smt. Uma Gupta Fellowship for M.Sc. Agriculture (Genetics & Plant Breeding) Students” scheme is implemented by Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance and encourage meritorious students pursuing the M.Sc. Agriculture (Genetics & Plant Breeding) course by offering a fellowship for three semesters, thereby reducing their economic burden.
schemeContent.benefits_md: **Amount of Fellowship:** ₹1,000/- per month (For three semesters only).
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance and encourage meritorious students pursuing the M.Sc. Agriculture (Genetics & Plant Breeding) course by offering a fellowship of ₹1000/- for three semesters, thereby reducing their economic burden.

children.text: The “Smt. Uma Gupta Fellowship for M.Sc. Agriculture (Genetics & Plant Breeding) Students” scheme is implemented by Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance and encourage meritorious students pursuing the M.Sc. Agriculture (Genetics & Plant Breeding) course by offering a fellowship for three semesters, thereby reducing their economic burden.

Students are first invited to submit their applications on the prescribed form. A committee, constituted by the Vice Chancellor, then reviews and evaluates these applications following a defined procedure. Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval, after which the selected students receive the fellowship payments.

applicationProcess.process_md: Students are first invited to submit their applications on the prescribed form. A committee, constituted by the Vice Chancellor, then reviews and evaluates these applications following a defined procedure. Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval, after which the selected students receive the fellowship payments.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant must be a student. 1. The applicant must be enrolled in the M.Sc. Agriculture (Genetics & Plant Breeding) course at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar. 1. The fellowship is awarded for a duration of three semesters only.

children.text: The applicant must be a student.
The applicant must be enrolled in the M.Sc. Agriculture (Genetics & Plant Breeding) course at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar.
The fellowship is awarded for a duration of three semesters only.
